title: cynometra sphaerocarpa
intro: Cynometra sphaerocarpa, also known as the 'Gamboge tree', is a plant species native to Southeast Asia and Australia, characterized by its yellow sap and medicinal properties. The sap of Cynometra sphaerocarpa contains gamboge resin, which has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Cynometra sphaerocarpa have been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating skin conditions. Cynometra sphaerocarpa can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
